total=8; 4 EM vs 4 normal; GSE145701 was processed by first restricting the dataset to the vehicle-treated samples only (4 Normal and 4 Endometriosis Stage IV samples). This ensured that all samples were compared under the same experimental condition, eliminating confounding due to hormone treatments (E2, P4, and E2+P4). Differential expression analysis was then performed using the existing limma pipeline without modifying the analysis workflow.
DROP; treatment study (dienogest/cAMP) — no healthy control group

Time-course dataset (Days 0, 2, 4, 6 and 8). For Phase 1 DEG analysis, only matched Day 8 samples were included (4 Endometriosis vs 4 Normal) to avoid confounding due to temporal gene expression changes. Earlier time points were excluded; disease vs control comparison was performed at the same time point.
HOLD; GEO series matrix contains no expression matrix (0×16). Supplementary files are precomputed DEG tables, not raw counts. DESeq2 cannot be run without generating counts from SRA (SRP124589).
